summary: Iteration 83 - Complete testing of new features: ScenarioModelling contrast improvements, Client360View with Hybrids/Crypto categories, CryptoPortfolio page, Navigation with Crypto (NEW badge), TransactionModeler multi-transaction support, MongoDB persistence for client-contact and financial-plan APIs. All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ ScenarioModelling.jsx: Tabs use bg-muted border-border classes, GoalCard uses text-foreground/text-muted-foreground, gradient header cards (from-[#1a2744] to-[#2a3f5f]) with proper white text
✅ Client360View.jsx: ASSET_HOLDINGS includes hybrids ($85K, 4 holdings) and crypto ($45K, 2 holdings) categories with proper icons
✅ CryptoPortfolio.jsx: New page with demo data for BTC, ETH, SOL, LINK, MATIC - shows holdings, P&L, allocation, risk warning
✅ Layout.jsx: Navigation shows Crypto under Finances with NEW badge, Hybrids under Trading with NEW badge
✅ TransactionModeler.jsx: Supports multiple transactions via transactions state array, Add to List, Save Scenario, Generate Plan buttons
✅ client_contact.py: Uses MongoDB (client_messages, client_notifications collections) for persistence instead of in-memory
✅ financial_plan.py: Uses MongoDB (financial_plans collection) for persistence, includes projections/tax/risk calculations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 verified all requested features: 1) ScenarioModelling has proper contrast - tabs with bg-muted, cards with gradient backgrounds and white text, 2) Client360View Holdings tab shows 7 asset categories including Hybrids ($85K) and Crypto ($45K), 3) CryptoPortfolio page loads with 5 crypto holdings (BTC, ETH, SOL, LINK, MATIC), 4) Navigation shows Crypto under Finances with NEW badge, 5) TransactionModeler supports multi-transaction scenarios with Add to List/Save/Generate Plan buttons, 6) POST/GET for client-contact and financial-plan APIs persist to MongoDB and retrieve correctly.

scenario_modelling_contrast.verification: Tabs use bg-muted border-border, GoalCard uses text-foreground classes, 4 gradient header cards with proper contrast

client360_hybrids_category.verification: Hybrids category shows $85,000 with 4 holdings (CBAPD, WBCPI, ANZPJ, NABPH)

client360_crypto_category.verification: Crypto category shows $45,000 with 2 holdings (BTC, ETH)

navigation_crypto_new_badge.verification: Crypto under Finances section with NEW badge visible in sidebar

crypto_portfolio_page.verification: Page loads with Portfolio/Market/Analysis tabs, 5 crypto holdings displayed with P&L

transaction_modeler_multi_transaction.verification: Supports adding multiple transactions to scenario list with Save Scenario and Generate Plan buttons

client_contact_mongodb_persistence.verification: POST /api/client-contact/send-message stores to MongoDB, GET retrieves correctly

financial_plan_mongodb_persistence.verification: POST /api/financial-plan/generate stores to MongoDB, GET /api/financial-plan/{plan_id} retrieves correctly

hybrids_trading_page.verification: Page shows Market Value $172,815, Average Yield 7.48%, 5 holdings with Details/Trade buttons

mocked_apis_list: Fathom integration (mock when no API key)
Crypto prices (static demo data in CryptoPortfolio.jsx)
Hybrids data (static demo data in HybridsTrading.jsx)
